texto: The only thing that gets you through is the firm, unbreakable belief that you have something special to offer. It's why people like Jack Nicholson make it when they're 30 and become one of the greatest actors to ever live. I'm sure when he was 21 someone said, "You ain't got it, kid!" But there is something innate inside us that tells us to not give up. And then you get better. I'm a much better singer and performer now than I was 10 years ago. If you believe in yourself, anything's possible.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Robin Thicke: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “The only thing that gets you through is the firm, unbreakable belief that you have something spec…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, self-belief, something pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: The only thing that gets you through is the firm, unbreakable belief that you have something special to offer. It's why people like Jack Nicholson make it when they're 30 and become one of the greatest actors to ever live. I'm sure when he was 21 someone said, "You ain't got it, kid!" But there is something innate inside us that tells us to not give up. And then you get better. I'm a much better singer and performer now than I was 10 years ago. If you believe in yourself, anything's possible.

texto: I'm trying to create the world around myself to be a place of as much equality and openheartedness as possible.
explicacao: Citação de Robin Thicke sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I'm trying to create the world around myself to be a place of as much equality and openheartednes…” articula amor, myself, world em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como world e place.
